task_completion.description: Load the 7VH8 structure and its electron density map into PyMOL
task_completion.visual_evidence: The PyMOL interface is open, and the right-hand object panel lists '7VH8' (or similar) and the density map '7vh8_2fofc'.

task_completion.description: Create an isomesh for the ligand density
task_completion.visual_evidence: A mesh object (e.g., named 'ligand_density') is listed in the object panel, and a wireframe mesh is visible in the 3D viewer surrounding the ligand.

task_completion.description: Display the protein as a cartoon and the ligand/catalytic residue as sticks
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the PyMOL 3D viewer, the main protein structure is shown as a cartoon (ribbons), while the ligand molecule and the nearby catalytic residue (CYS 145) are shown as sticks.

task_completion.description: Measure the distance between the catalytic cysteine and the ligand
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dashed measurement line is visible in the PyMOL viewer connecting the catalytic cysteine (CYS 145) to the ligand, with a distance label showing a value between 1.6 and 2.0 Angstroms.

task_completion.description: Save a high-resolution PNG image of the visualization
task_completion.visual_evidence: The PyMOL command line shows a 'png' command saving to '/home/ga/PyMOL_Data/images/paxlovid_density.png', or a file manager/terminal shows the image file has been created.

task_completion.description: Write the structural analysis report with the required details
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output shows the contents of 'paxlovid_density_report.txt' containing the ligand code '4WI', the residue 'CYS 145', the contour level '1.0', and the measured distance.

integrity.description: The agent actively used PyMOL to visualize and measure the structure.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the PyMOL GUI open with the structure loaded and manipulated, rather than just writing a script without executing it.

integrity.description: The distance reported matches the measurement taken in PyMOL.
integrity.visual_evidence: The distance value written in the text report matches the value shown on the measurement label in the PyMOL 3D viewer.

integrity.description: The saved image is a genuine render from PyMOL.
integrity.visual_evidence: The PyMOL command line or GUI shows the 'ray' or 'png' command being executed to generate the image.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The nirmatrelvir ligand has the 3-letter PDB code '4WI'. The catalytic residue forming a covalent bond is CYS 145. The expected C-S bond distance is approximately 1.81 Å (acceptable range is 1.6 to 2.0 Å). The isomesh contour level must be 1.0. The image should be saved to /home/ga/PyMOL_Data/images/paxlovid_density.png and the report to /home/ga/PyMOL_Data/paxlovid_density_report.txt.
